title: EVA Pilots Identity Public knowledge
wikitext:
[]: EVA Pilots Identity- Public knowledge?             Quote Post by pen-pen » Mon Mar 14, 2011 11:05 pm Hi, I apologize if this has been posted before; but does anyone know whether(referring to the Anime): The Public (aside from Toji & Kensuke) knows Shinji, Rei & Asuka as EVA Pilots? Or is it TOP SECRET?

[]:             Quote Post by Spud » Mon Mar 14, 2011 11:34 pm Well the class knew Shinji was a pilot because he told them (on the computer) They must have sooner or later found out that Rei was a pilot (most likely from asking Shinji) Asuka was bragging about it (always wearing her A10 nerve clips) This would account for the class, I don't know about the rest of Tokyo-3

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Mon Mar 14, 2011 11:39 pm Spud wrote: Well the class knew Shinji was a pilot because he told them (on the computer) They must have sooner or later found out that Rei was a pilot (most likely from asking Shinji) Asuka was bragging about it (always wearing her A10 nerve clips) This would account for the class, I don't know about the rest of Tokyo-3

[]:             Quote Post by Spud » Mon Mar 14, 2011 11:43 pm Yeah that's something that has always puzzled me. Why go through all this secrecy but practically forget about the pilots? I was actually wondering about how much NERV kept from the public? Like what did the public know about the Angles? What did they know about the Eva's? If I missed/messed something please correct me.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon Mar 14, 2011 11:45 pm Don't ya know? NERV sucks at EVERYTHING!!! They can't even afford competent pilots to fight Angels!

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Tue Mar 15, 2011 12:14 am Shogo-Kun wrote: Don't ya know? NERV sucks at EVERYTHING!!! They can't even afford competent pilots to fight Angels!

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Mar 15, 2011 12:16 am I presume it's(Anime/Manga) based loosely on our Government(worldwide in general)... keeping a multitude of classified stuff from the society... eg. UFO discoveries, Weather Warfares, where taxpayer's money REALLY goes to etc... That's another whole new subject.... Anyways, back to EVA; I still love the Anime/Manga in general, & consider it the 'mother' of all Anime/Mangas....

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Tue Mar 15, 2011 12:20 am pen-pen wrote: I presume it's(Anime/Manga) based loosely on our Government(worldwide in general)... keeping a multitude of classified stuff from the society... eg. UFO discoveries, Weather Warfares, where taxpayer's money REALLY goes to etc... That's another whole new subject.... Anyways, back to EVA; I still love the Anime/Manga in general, & consider it the 'mother' of all Anime/Mangas....

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Mar 15, 2011 1:02 am Leighton wrote: Well, i guess SEELE is well concealed from the public. NERV is covering their plans i guess in a way that seems less corrupt. Apart from Gendo's plan.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Mar 15, 2011 2:04 am pen-pen wrote: Now 'SEELE' is a tricky one- is it an organization 'within' the Government? Secret society...?

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Mar 15, 2011 2:21 am Sachi wrote: Think 'Illuminati.'

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Mar 15, 2011 11:49 am That the EVAS are piloted by children seems to be public knowdlege (Tokita knew and no one was surprised)

Or is it TOP SECRET?
